_comment: Copy to seed-pmids.json and replace with PMIDs from your own field. The pipeline averages embedding vectors of these papers to build a research profile that drives scoring. 30-100 PMIDs per bucket is plenty.

_buckets.core: Papers central to your research — the work you build on most directly.
_buckets.methods: Papers that exemplify the methods, models, or tools you use or want to track.
_buckets.adjacent: Papers in adjacent fields you actively follow but don't work in directly.
